config.execPath.drawio: Path to the draw.io executable. If not specified, the default command for each OS will be used. (Windows: drawio.exe, macOS: drawio, others: drawio)
config.execPath.ghostscript: Path to the Ghostscript executable. If not specified, the default command will be used. (macOS/Linux: gs, Windows: gswin64c.exe)
config.execPath.pdftocairo: Path to the pdftocairo executable. If not specified, pdftocairo will be used.
config.execPath.rsvgConvert: Path to the rsvg-convert executable. If not specified, rsvg-convert will be used.
config.convertToPdf.svg.engine: Engine used when converting SVG files to PDF.
config.convertToPdf.svg.puppeteer.browse: Chrome browser channel used by puppeteer-core when converting SVG files to PDF. Ignored when an executable path is set.
config.convertToPdf.svg.puppeteer.execut: Browser executable path used by puppeteer-core when converting SVG files to PDF. If set, this takes precedence over the browser channel.
config.convertToPdf.mermaid.puppeteer.br: Chrome browser channel used by Mermaid CLI when converting Mermaid files to PDF. Ignored when an executable path is set.
config.convertToPdf.mermaid.puppeteer.ex: Browser executable path used by Mermaid CLI when converting Mermaid files to PDF. If set, this takes precedence over the browser channel.
config.convertToSvg.mermaid.puppeteer.br: Chrome browser channel used by Mermaid CLI when converting Mermaid files to SVG. Ignored when an executable path is set.
config.convertToSvg.mermaid.puppeteer.ex: Browser executable path used by Mermaid CLI when converting Mermaid files to SVG. If set, this takes precedence over the browser channel.
config.convertToWebp.effort: CPU effort used when encoding WebP output. 0 is fastest and 6 is slowest.
config.convertToAvif.effort: CPU effort used when encoding AVIF output. 0 is fastest and 9 is slowest.
config.outputPath.cropPdf: Output file name after cropping the PDF
config.outputPath.splitPdf: Output file name for each page after splitting the PDF
config.outputPath.convertToPdf: Output file name when converting to PDF. Leave empty to use the input/output pair-specific setting. For multi-page inputs, include ${page} to avoid output path conflicts.
config.outputPath.convertToPng: Output file name when converting to PNG. Leave empty to use the input/output pair-specific setting. For multi-page inputs, include ${page} to avoid output path conflicts.
config.outputPath.convertToJpeg: Output file name when converting to JPEG. Leave empty to use the input/output pair-specific setting. For multi-page inputs, include ${page} to avoid output path conflicts.
config.outputPath.convertToWebp: Output file name when converting to WebP. Leave empty to use the input/output pair-specific setting. For multi-page inputs, include ${page} to avoid output path conflicts.
config.outputPath.convertToAvif: Output file name when converting to AVIF. Leave empty to use the input/output pair-specific setting. For multi-page inputs, include ${page} to avoid output path conflicts.
config.outputPath.convertToSvg: Output file name when converting to SVG. Leave empty to use the input/output pair-specific setting. For multi-page inputs, include ${page} to avoid output path conflicts.
config.outputPath.clipboardImage: Default output path shown when pasting a clipboard image. The file extension is added automatically.
config.figure.graphicsOptions: Available options for the LaTeX includegraphics command.
config.subfigure.verticalAlignmentOption: Available vertical alignment options for minipage snippets.
config.subfigure.widthOptions: Available width options for minipage snippets.
config.subfigure.spacingOptions: Available spacing options between minipage snippets.
config.cropPdf.marginOptions: Margin options in PDF points shown when automatically cropping PDFs
config.outputPath.convertDrawioToPdf: Output file name after converting the Draw.io file to PDF
config.outputPath.convertDrawioToPng: Output file name after converting the Draw.io file to PNG
config.outputPath.convertDrawioToJpeg: Output file name after converting the Draw.io file to JPEG
config.outputPath.convertDrawioToWebp: Output file name after converting the Draw.io file to WebP
config.outputPath.convertDrawioToAvif: Output file name after converting the Draw.io file to AVIF
config.outputPath.convertDrawioToSvg: Output file name after converting the Draw.io file to SVG
config.outputPath.convertPdfToPng: Output file name after converting the PDF to PNG
config.outputPath.convertPdfToJpeg: Output file name after converting the PDF to JPEG
config.outputPath.convertPdfToWebp: Output file name after converting the PDF to WebP
config.outputPath.convertPdfToAvif: Output file name after converting the PDF to AVIF
config.outputPath.convertPdfToSvg: Output file name after converting the PDF to SVG
config.outputPath.convertPngToPdf: Output file name after converting the PNG to PDF
config.outputPath.convertPngToJpeg: Output file name after converting the PNG to JPEG
config.outputPath.convertPngToWebp: Output file name after converting the PNG to WebP
config.outputPath.convertPngToAvif: Output file name after converting the PNG to AVIF
config.outputPath.convertJpegToPdf: Output file name after converting the JPEG to PDF
config.outputPath.convertJpegToPng: Output file name after converting the JPEG to PNG
config.outputPath.convertJpegToWebp: Output file name after converting the JPEG to WebP
config.outputPath.convertJpegToAvif: Output file name after converting the JPEG to AVIF
config.outputPath.convertWebpToPdf: Output file name after converting the WebP to PDF
config.outputPath.convertWebpToPng: Output file name after converting the WebP to PNG
config.outputPath.convertWebpToJpeg: Output file name after converting the WebP to JPEG
config.outputPath.convertWebpToAvif: Output file name after converting the WebP to AVIF
config.outputPath.convertAvifToPdf: Output file name after converting the AVIF to PDF
config.outputPath.convertAvifToPng: Output file name after converting the AVIF to PNG
config.outputPath.convertAvifToJpeg: Output file name after converting the AVIF to JPEG
config.outputPath.convertAvifToWebp: Output file name after converting the AVIF to WebP
config.outputPath.convertSvgToPdf: Output file name after converting the SVG to PDF
config.outputPath.convertSvgToPng: Output file name after converting the SVG to PNG
config.outputPath.convertSvgToJpeg: Output file name after converting the SVG to JPEG
config.outputPath.convertSvgToWebp: Output file name after converting the SVG to WebP
config.outputPath.convertSvgToAvif: Output file name after converting the SVG to AVIF
config.outputPath.convertMermaidToSvg: Output file name after converting the Mermaid file to SVG
config.outputPath.convertMermaidToPdf: Output file name after converting the Mermaid file to PDF
config.outputPath.convertMermaidToPng: Output file name after converting the Mermaid file to PNG
config.outputPath.convertMermaidToJpeg: Output file name after converting the Mermaid file to JPEG
config.outputPath.convertMermaidToWebp: Output file name after converting the Mermaid file to WebP
config.outputPath.convertMermaidToAvif: Output file name after converting the Mermaid file to AVIF
config.contextMenu.cropPdf.enabled: Enable context menu for cropping PDFs
config.contextMenu.splitPdf.enabled: Enable context menu for splitting PDFs
config.contextMenu.mergePdf.enabled: Enable context menu for merging PDFs
config.contextMenu.convertDrawio.enabled: Enable context menu for converting Draw.io files to PDF or image formats
config.contextMenu.convertPdf.enabled: Enable context menu for converting PDFs to image formats
config.contextMenu.convertPng.enabled: Enable context menu for converting PNG files to PDF or image formats
config.contextMenu.convertJpeg.enabled: Enable context menu for converting JPEG files to PDF or image formats
config.contextMenu.convertWebp.enabled: Enable context menu for converting WebP files to PDF or image formats
config.contextMenu.convertAvif.enabled: Enable context menu for converting AVIF files to PDF or image formats
config.contextMenu.convertSvg.enabled: Enable context menu for converting SVG files to PDF or image formats
config.contextMenu.convertMermaid.enable: Enable context menu for converting Mermaid files
pasteAsPdfDetail: Save clipboard image as PDF and insert a figure snippet
pasteAsImageDetail: Save clipboard image as an image file and insert a figure snippet
pasteOutputPathPrompt: Edit the output path. The file extension is added automatically.
pasteOutputPathOutsideWorkspace: The output path must be inside the workspace.
message.progress.convertPngToPdf.title: Converting {0} PNG file(s) to PDF
message.progress.convertToPdf.title: Converting {0} selected file(s) to PDF
message.progress.convertToOutput.title: Converting {0} file(s) to {1}
message.progress.cropPdf.title: Cropping {0} PDF file(s)
message.progress.splitPdf.title: Splitting {0} PDF file(s)
message.convertPngToPdf.failed: Failed to convert PNG to PDF: {0}
message.undo.none: There is no conversion to undo.
message.undo.newerConversionCompleted: A newer conversion has completed. The older conversion was not removed.
message.undo.failed: Could not undo the last conversion: {0}
